note: Date computed deterministically (2nd Tuesday rule). Agenda PDF is typically posted 3 business days before each meeting at the Agenda Center; until then agendaUrl stays null.

meeting.title: Regular City Council Meeting
meeting.agendaPostedNote: Posted 3 business days before each meeting at the Agenda Center
